name: example-webgl-caustic-pool
title: Caustic Pool

title_i18n.ja: コースティック・プール

description: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: animated water caustics woven from domain-warped ripples; click the water to drop a ripple. No meshes, no textures.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：由域扭曲涟漪织成的动态水面焦散；点击水面掉涟漪。无网格、无贴图。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 自包含 WebGL2 主視覺：由域扭曲漣漪織成的動態水面焦散；點擊水面掉漣漪。無網格、無貼圖。
description_i18n.en: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: animated water caustics woven from domain-warped ripples; click the water to drop a ripple. No meshes, no textures.

query.en: Build a self-contained WebGL2 hero of animated water caustics from domain-warped ripples, with a click-to-ripple interaction.
query.zh-CN: 构建自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：域扭曲涟漪织成的动态水面焦散，点击掉涟漪。
